title: service-offering model defines tiered pricing with option groups and service groups
content:
# service-offering model defines tiered pricing with option groups and service groups

`powerhouse/service-offering` is the central document model in this project. It manages a complete service catalog with tiered pricing.

## State Shape

```graphql
type ServiceOfferingState {
    id: PHID!
    operatorId: PHID!              # → BuilderProfile (external)
    resourceTemplateId: PHID       # → ResourceTemplate
    title: String!
    summary: String!
    status: ServiceStatus!         # DRAFT | COMING_SOON | ACTIVE | DEPRECATED
    availableBillingCycles: [BillingCycle!]!
    targetAudiences: [TargetAudience!]!
    facetTargets: [FacetTarget!]!
    facetBindings: [ResourceFacetBinding!]!
    serviceGroups: [ServiceGroup!]!
    services: [Service!]!
    tiers: [ServiceSubscriptionTier!]!
    optionGroups: [OptionGroup!]!
    finalConfiguration: FinalConfiguration
}
```

## Modules (7)

| Module | Operations | Purpose |
|--------|-----------|---------|
| offering | 14 | Core metadata, operator, resource template, audiences, facets, billing cycles |
| services | 5 | Add/update/delete services, facet bindings |
| tiers | 12 | Tier CRUD, service levels, usage limits, billing cycle discounts, pricing mode |
| option-groups | 10 | Option group CRUD, standalone/tier-dependent pricing, discount mode |
| service-groups | 10 | Service group CRUD, tier pricing, setup costs, recurring price options |
| configuration | 2 | Set/clear final configuration (resolved pricing snapshot) |

## Key Internal References

- `Service.serviceGroupId: OID` → ServiceGroup (groups services)
- `Service.optionGroupId: OID` → OptionGroup (links service to option group)
- `ServiceGroupTierPricing.tierId: OID` → ServiceSubscriptionTier
- `OptionGroupTierPricing.tierId: OID` → ServiceSubscriptionTier
- `ServiceLevelBinding.serviceId: OID` → Service
- `ServiceUsageLimit.serviceId: OID` → Service

## External References

- `operatorId: PHID` → BuilderProfile (external Powerhouse model)
- `resourceTemplateId: PHID` → ResourceTemplate (this project)
- `facetBindings.facetType: PHID` → Facet (this project)

---

Topics:
- [[schema design]]
- [[object relations]]
- [[architecture decisions]]
description: The largest model (51 ops, 7 modules) — manages tiers, service groups, option groups, billing cycles, discounts, and final configuration for a service catalog
